sources.title: Pet Health Symptoms Dataset (2K clinical notes)
sources.trustLevelReason: Retain for offline lexical recall, but keep below the live trust floor because duplicate and labeling noise remain high.
sources.notes: Round-2 audit demotes this source from the default trust 60 to trust 40.

sources.title: Veterinary Clinical Dataset (10K records)
sources.trustLevelReason: This source stays at the live floor: broad enough to remain useful, but still not a primary verified literature source.
sources.notes: Round-2 audit keeps this source at trust 60 and uses it as the minimum-trust live text source.

sources.title: Curated Canine Dermatology Follow-up Cases
sources.trustLevelReason: Promote to trust 80 once the local curated export is available; this is the replacement-quality dermatology slice for round 2.
sources.notes: Higher-quality source identified for the second pass. The ingest stays dormant until the local CSV export is available.

sources.title: Curated Canine Toxicology and Exposure Follow-up Cases
sources.trustLevelReason: Ingestion-ready high-confidence source for toxicology and exposure follow-up cases once the approved export is staged locally.
sources.notes: Higher-quality source identified for the second pass. The manifest keeps it ready without fabricating local data in-repo.

sources.title: Breed-Specific Clinical Cases (Top 10 Dog Breeds)
sources.trustLevelReason: Curated breed-tagged clinical cases for the highest-priority canine breeds. Every record carries an explicit breed ID, condition label, domain, and trust >= 70.
sources.notes: VET-1217 adds 30 dedicated clinical cases spanning the top 10 prioritized dog breeds and 3 high-signal conditions per breed.
